items.summary: Positioned as a senior operator focused on sales, service, parts, customer process, team training, and systems-backed operational improvement.
highlights: Aligns process improvement with real dealership execution rather than abstract transformation goals.
Builds practical systems and standards that support accountability, manager coaching, and customer follow-through.
Bridges leadership priorities across revenue operations, fixed operations, and staff enablement.

items.summary: Led operational performance with emphasis on process consistency, customer experience, team execution, and measurable operational discipline.
highlights: Improved workflow alignment across sales and service touchpoints.
Supported managers through clearer expectations, better reporting habits, and repeatable operating rhythms.
Advanced collaboration between departments that typically operate in silos.

items.summary: Developed a strong perspective on fixed operations execution, customer handling, and the practical systems required to improve consistency in service environments.
highlights: Focused on customer communication, process discipline, and operational follow-up.
Contributed to service workflow improvement and stronger accountability structures.
Built insight into how frontline execution affects broader business performance.

items.role: Sales, CRM, and Customer Process Experience
items.summary: Built hands-on knowledge around lead management, CRM discipline, customer engagement, and the systems required to support consistent team performance.
highlights: Strengthened understanding of the revenue side of dealership operations.
Developed appreciation for structured follow-up, pipeline management, and customer communication standards.
Created the foundation for later systems and training-focused leadership work.
